texto: We can imagine how to create and be creative on a beach in a cosmic sky. No grain of sand is merely just sandy
autor: with imagination at hand the sand can become whatever you fancy.
explicacao: Citação de with imagination at hand the sand can become whatever you fancy. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “We can imagine how to create and be creative on a beach in a cosmic sky. No grain of sand is mere…” articula reflexao, jennifer-sodini, imagine em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como dia-chuvoso e reflexao.
